text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Um… you two have just been standing 
there… do you need something?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: L-Like I said, it's not your fault!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Um… did you… wrong me somehow?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Well, um… Rice and I made a picture book, 
as a birthday present for you.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
It had a nice story about you riding a black 
cat and finding legendary coffee beans. 
But right as we were about to bind the book…

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
The last page went missing! We looked 
everywhere but couldn't find it… 
Sorry, it's all my fault!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
…That's okay. A picture book without 
an ending… sounds nice, actually.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
From what I can tell… it's the things we can't 
see that stir our imaginations the most…

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
So a missing last page… could make the story 
even more compelling…

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
What I mean to say is… Thank you. 
I… appreciate your gift.
